output.formatted:
The song "How You Remind Me" by Nickelback was released on June 28, 2001.

<answer>
June 28, 2001
</answer>

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?song ?releaseDate WHERE {
  ?song rdfs:label "How You Remind Me" @en ; wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
}
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 2 columns:
| song        | releaseDate                         |
| ----------- | ----------------------------------- |
| wd:Q2452188 | 2001-06-28T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
